positive: A retro synthwave cityscape vista at sunset. Neon grids receding into a digital horizon, chrome sports cars, palm trees, and glowing geometric patterns. Vaporwave aesthetic, vaporwave, high contrast, 80s synthwave poster art, vibrant magenta and cyan palette.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, natural elements, soft colors, photorealism, grainy, messy
